rogue_introduction: Dont't forget there are masteries and traits to be chose on the left.<page>These black ones are masteries. You can choose one of them freely.<page>Those colored ones are traits. If you are not satisfied with them, you can reroll them by pressing the Reroll button. The remaining rerolls are shown on the left of the screen.<page>Hurry up, Imma sleep now
get_one_skill_up_name: Select Upgrade for Dash/Nail/an Available Spell
test_desc:
·You can choose an extra one when choosing random traits


——There's a limit to vessel ability. I've learnt one thing in my short life. The harder you plan, the less things will go according to your plans. As long as you cannot go beyond vesselity…
——What? What are you saying?
——I reject my vesselity, THK!
test_dream: You're ready to walk into the bar and ask where the bathroom is.
nail_master_desc:
·Start with sharpened nail, cloak & Nailmaster's Glory
·+1 max nail upgrade
·Assimilate the art of nail through growth

Despite the masterly skills he features, he never parade these. Even if you tell him wield his nail like a club he would merely smile faintly.

But if you want to try him out, maybe you can pay him a few geo less
shaman_desc:
·Start with +2 masks, wings, fireball & Shaman's Stone
·Enhanced spells at the cost of feeble slashes
·Able to learn stronger lifeblood spells

Shaman is always the name of a group rather than a certain individual. But somehow there are more and more bugs directly call him shaman recently.
hunter_desc:
·Start with cloak, claws, wings, crystal heart, Steady Body & Quick Slash
·The range of nail attack improves with nail upgrade
·Blaze the path to survive through growth

Lurking, murdering, reeling silk from cocoons

In a world of hunters, you are either a murderer or a murderee.
uunn_desc:
·Start with +4 notches, Shape of Unn, Quick Focus & Deep Focus
·These 3 charms cost no notch
·Cultivate the power of Unn through growth

A former Greenpath guardian she was, and she keeps her heart of loving kindness, though her power has waned through time.
Unn is never a synonym of coward
uunn_dream: Your body is invulnerable to nails or dreams.
joni_desc:
·Start with max masks, vessels, notches & all charms
·Joni's Blessing is forced equipped
·A mind of still water, the power of the fallen
·Triggering Rancid Egg only heals 1 mask
·Get rid of the curse through growth

Despite being a heathen, Blue Child Joni seldom conflicts with others. Mercy is she, she will genuinely bless all the wandering passersby.
moth_desc:
·Start with dream nail, Dream Wielder, sharpened nail & +1 mask
·Start with +8 notches & a charm of your choice
·Discover the magic of dreams through growth

Looking after the tombstones and leading the wielder, the seer repeats her days to repent the former sins, without complaining.

Just occasionally, she dreams of that beam of forgotten light.
grey_prince_desc:
·Start with white spells, shade cloak & dream nail
·All charms cost no notch, but no nail upgrades are available
·Break free from the bind of nail through growth

Time for

FANTASY!!!
tuk_desc:
·Start with 5 Rancid Eggs, 500 geo & 3 masks
·+1 nail upgrade or +2 masks upon Rancid Egg usage
·Explode when damaged as a counterattack
·Take another another chance through growth

A fragile but strong-minded scavenger of Royal Waterways.

Feasts and friends, water flows to bring you all yu needed. Tuk just need to tell them apart.
mantis_desc:
·Start with sharpened nail & claws
·0-notched Mark of Pride is forced equipped
·x1.25 nail damage
·Can't learn and use spells
·Sharpen the nail through growth


They still keeps their wisdom and glory, as well as their lethal tradition. Strenth their confidence and pride their marks.

Wanderer looking for a death, wish you an instant dispatch.
collector_desc:
·x0.5 Nail & Spell damage (flukes remain unchanged)
·Acquire Grimm Child. A binded Mark of DreamShield
·Your summons will get stronger for your nail&spells
·Your summoning charms cost 0 notch but reduce your own damage

Approaching is love, protecting is love, pretending is love, prisoning is love, too.
It doesn't matter if you don't understand… It doesn't matter…
shop_keeper_key_desc:
Reroll shop.


The key of Sly's storage, which can be used for the keeper to restock once. Of course, if the restock doesn't satisfy you, the keeper reserves all rights for final explanation.
shop_nail_upgrade_desc:
+1 Nail Upgrade


The sharper the better?
The purer the better?
Once some bugs thought about the questions. Unfortunately, they'd gotten no answer.
shop_random_gift_desc: "Life is like a box of chocolates, you never know what you are going to get."
shop_egg_desc:
+1 Revive chance


No need for wording, just hail the egg!
shop_pretty_key_desc: A pretty key made of shinny silver colored metal with a special mark carved into it. Gliters in the dark with a 8-geo-worthy luster
pretty_key_Easter_egg_1: Woah you found the easter egg!
pretty_key_Easter_egg_5: You're not giving up? It seems you're running out of geo.
pretty_key_Easter_egg_7: Tell you a secret: there are no more stuff next.
shop_refresh_desc:
+1 Reroll


A simple key sometimes opens the door into future.
menu_intro: This mod is Roguelike mod for Hollow Knight
godseeker: Godseeker seems to have something to tell you
custom_always_parry_desc: Inspect the movement of your enemies, and defuse their attack with nail hits.
custom_another_jump_desc: Stronger than the Monarch Wings... But you've got to get it first.
custom_better_dream_nail_desc: With Whispering Root strengthening the dreams, you can move freely when breaking into minds.
custom_better_fluke_desc: This last gift Fluke Hermit leaves keeps the flukes alive after they hit.
custom_chaos_boss_desc: The strong gravity distorts the spacetime as well as the following rooms.
custom_circle_super_dash_desc: As you attune to the Crystal Heart, you can now change the direction by pressing attack.
custom_one_two_dash_doublejump_refresh_d: You can refresh the dash with a double jump
You can refresh the double jump with a dash
custom_one_two_another_collider_desc_1: You can push the enemy in front of you
custom_one_two_another_collider_desc_2: You can prop up enemies with your head
custom_dont_move_when_damaged_desc: Better Stalwart Shell that prevents you from being knocked back
custom_double_scream_desc:
You enabled the Echo Form of the Abyss Shriek.
You enabled the Echo Form of the Abyss Shriek.
custom_equip_charm_everywhere_desc: Greater positions come with greater costs. You can change your charms anywhere, but take double damage.
custom_fast_shadow_dash_desc: The power of the void wrapping your cloak, breaks your shadow free.
custom_gliding_desc: The wings of the lifeblood butterfly grant you the power of gliding, but you still need to land carefully.
custom_little_box_desc: A fluffy Shrub gift this to you. Seemingly unchanged, you are less likely to be attacked, just like some Hakurei miko.
custom_money_is_power_desc: The more geo you have, the more powerful you are. At least Divine believes.
custom_nail_art_after_dash_desc: Cloth's handy weapon. Your dash will be followed by a slash when equipping it.
custom_one_mask_two_blue_desc: The belief in lifeblood is a blessing rather than a curse. Equip it, and you'll gradually become as elegant as I am. —— Joni the Blue Child
custom_refresh_dash_desc: Have you ever noticed the leisurely creatures flying freely in the Garden? Aluba's wings make your movements refresh more flexibly.
custom_sleep_knight_desc: The Knight that loses its dreams lies down. Press the C-Dash key to change the direction you creep.
custom_super_dash_tail_desc: Causes the Crystal Heart of the bearer to emit a heroic odour.
custom_counted_trinket1_convo: Your experience fills another page of your diary
custom_counted_trinket3_convo: Let the Pale King relieve your burdens.
custom_trinket1_desc: The abundant experience enriches your battle skills. The more journals you own, the higher your damage.
custom_trinket2_desc: A souvenir from the Hallownest that attracts some enthusiasts. When in the shop, the keeper will offer you a free deal.
custom_trinket3_desc: A Pale King accessory that loses its value long ago. A friend has it that this waste can be turned into a treasure, doubling your current geo.
custom_trinket4_desc: Your curiosity about its content drives your Focus away; instead, you start hatching. 25 times, and then it's hatched in the next resting place.
love_key_desc:
Open the Kingdom's Edge alternative route. A few dark shadows await at the end...

Warning: After entering the alternative route, you'll face a significantly harder next section and an abundant amount of additional score. Make sure you are fully prepared before purchasing the key.
tram_pass_desc:
Open the Elite Guard alternative route. You may meet your siblings... or is it just a mirage?

Warning: After entering the alternative route, you'll face a significantly harder next section and an abundant amount of additional score. Make sure you are fully prepared before purchasing the key.
city_crest_desc:
Open the Ragnarok alternative route. Only the well-prepared, ever-victorious general could survive the trial.

Warning: After entering the alternative route, you'll face a significantly harder next section and an abundant amount of additional score. Make sure you are fully prepared before purchasing the key.
mender_key_desc:
Open the Radiant Final alternative route. Seems that in Menderbug's cellar, there is an inconceivable seal possessing oppressive power. Is it infection... Or...?

Warning: After entering the alternative route, you'll face a significantly harder next section and an abundant amount of additional score. Make sure you are fully prepared before purchasing the key.
npc_emilitia_conv_2: Want to listen to my stories?
npc_jiji_conv_1: Hello, I ended up here without figuring out how.<page>There are no regrets here, but I've got some rare stuff.
npc_jiji_conv_2: Offer me some food in return for stuff I found. Is it a fair deal?
npc_jiji_conv_3: Fine. Then I'll just have to be hungry for a while.
npc_jiji_select_conv: Exchange 2 Rancid Eggs for rare stuff?
npc_jinn_conv_1: ...It came back. Does it remember Jinn? Will It offer a gift? Trade for useless shinies?
npc_jinn_conv_2: Shinies for tiny It... Good to give Shinies. Less burden for Jinn.
rogue_level_select_conv: Select the level you want to challenge.
npc_smith_conv_1: I can reforge the nail for you.<page>No Pale Ore required. Just pay me some geo.
npc_smith_conv_4: I've got a new idea.<page>If you can give me some Geo for my efforts, I can make it more perfect.
npc_smith_conv_5: The perfect Nail... You don't need my help now.
npc_wishpool_conv_1: It's a wishing well.<page>You can make your wishes here.
npc_wishpool_select_conv: Throw 100 geo into it, and let the Pale King relieve your burdens.
npc_wishpool_res_1: You are granted the wish of the Pale King.
npc_wishpool_res_2: You are granted the power of regeneration.
npc_wishpool_res_3: You are granted the betting of the destiny.
npc_quirrel_nail_dream_1: He wouldn't mind if other explorers took his weapons.
npc_quirrel_nail_dream_2: Some things are better left in place
flower_spa_3: Thank you for your efforts, stranger, but this is not your destination
flower_spa_4_1: Keep moving forward, there may be a different scenery ahead
flower_spa_4_2: Safe tiding on your journey. My heart does flutter to feel such kindness from so tiny a creature.
modboss_in_workshop: Challenge modBoss in the hall of gods
